rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §28.054, which governs subsidies for AP/IB exam fees. No overlap in subject matter, funding, or operation.
quote: A student is entitled to a subsidy for a fee paid by the student to take a college advanced placement test or an international baccalaureate examination if the student demonstrates financial need.
_note: No conflict; the rule text concerns an unrelated education subsidy program.
